home.title: Chemistry — Revision
home.intro: Detailed content will be added once the revision booklet is available. Below: planned topic structure and an overview of the IB MYP G9 Chemistry essentials.

protonsNeutrons.title: Atomic structure
protonsNeutrons.body: Atomic number Z = number of protons. Mass number A = protons + neutrons. Isotopes share Z but differ in A.

ionicVsCovalent.title: Ionic vs covalent
ionicVsCovalent.body: Ionic: metal + non-metal, electrons transferred. Covalent: non-metal + non-metal, electrons shared.

moles.title: Mole concept
moles.body: n = m / M. Avogadro: 1 mol = 6.022 × 10²³ particles. At STP, 1 mol of any gas occupies 22.4 dm³.

balancing.title: Balancing equations
balancing.body: Atoms must be conserved. Adjust coefficients (not subscripts). Check H and O last.

pH.title: pH scale
pH.body: pH 0–7 acidic, 7 neutral, 7–14 alkaline. Each whole number = 10× change in H⁺ concentration.

reactionTypes.title: Reaction types
reactionTypes.body: Combination, decomposition, single displacement, double displacement (incl. neutralisation), combustion.
